raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX my American Express card was charged in the amount of {$2800.00}. I contacted American Express and informed them this was not my purchase. They issued a credit to my account. I also contacted the company XXXX. about the charge. They sent me an E-Mail on XX/XX/XXXX, stating that my account with them has been closed since XX/XX/XXXX. And my American Express has never been attached to that account. Nor do they see any activity to my Closed account. I received an E-Mail from American Express on XX/XX/XXXX they Debit my card back in the amount of {$2800.00} because they said I gave XXXX my American Express Card information. XXXX already said this was NOT true. The reason for this DEBIT is MUTE!
